name: testDeleteMerchantAcquirer
description: Merchant acquirer can be successfully deleted and no longer appears in the table
descriptionHtml: Merchant acquirer can be successfully deleted and no longer appears in the table

Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field

steps.name: Click on 'System administration' menu in Header
Select '0702.044531 acquirer for gateway' acquirer using filter
Select '0702.044531 acquirer2 for gateway' acquirer using filter
Click 'Delete merchant acquirer' for merchant acquirer with name: Acquirer2 display name
Verify: Success deletion alert message is shown
